## Verification

How did you confirm the breaking change applies in this version window?

## Checklist

- [ ] JSON validates against `schema.json`
- [ ] Filename follows convention: `entries/{pkg}/{pkg}__{fn}__{from_version}.json`
- [ ] `from_version` < `to_version`
- [ ] Description explains old behaviour, new behaviour, and analytical consequence
- [ ] Reference URL points to an official changelog or documentation entry
- [ ] Version window follows the [design principles](README.md#version-window-design-principles)
